questions: how many countries are in the UN?
answers: The United Nations is an international organization founded in 1945 with 193 member states, working to maintain peace, security, and cooperation among nations worldwide.
UN holo ekta international organization ja world peace, human rights, ar development er jonno kaj kore. Headquarter New York e.
The UN has six main organs including the General Assembly, Security Council, and International Court of Justice, addressing issues from conflict resolution to humanitarian aid.
The United Nations works on global challenges like climate change, poverty, disease, and human rights violations through its various agencies and programs across the world.
